/CAL  SET OR DISPO/X DEFENDANT IS ACM COMPLIANT/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-29-19/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/CTORD:GPS DEVICE REMOVAL/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LDPX: 04-08-19/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X: THE DEFENSE' ORAL 17B MOTION IS DENIED/NTW/LDPX: 02-21-19/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD: CURFEW FROM 5PM-1AM/CTORD: ACM CHECK-IN BY PHONE 4 TIMES PER WEEK/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
